description: Style NotePure police London homme, for men, is available in a dark flacon with flag and lion symbol. Product DetailsThis composition offers a blend of aromatic notes enhanced with woody accords and spices. Top notes encompass lavender, incense and ginger a heart features warm notes of cardamom, amber and patchouli, while a base includes cedar, vanilla and muskCautionFlammableKeep away from sources of ignitionKeep away from childrenDo not use near fire, flame or heatAvoid spraying near the eyesSizeQuantity: 50 ml
